desc: Cronogramas, OKRs, KPIs e ferramentas de planejamento estratégico.

cards.def: A high-level visual plan outlining strategic goals, key milestones, and the timeline for achieving them.
cards.ex: "Our 18-month product roadmap aligns engineering capacity with commercial priorities across three verticals."
cards.tip: Strategic roadmap (macro) vs product roadmap (features/releases). Ferramenta de comunicação com stakeholders.

cards.def: Objectives and Key Results: a framework pairing qualitative aspirational goals with quantifiable outcomes.
cards.ex: "Q2 OKR — Objective: achieve LATAM market leadership; KRs: 3 enterprise contracts signed, NPS up 40%."
cards.tip: Google, McKinsey, Intel usam. O = aspiracional. KR = mensurável. Score 0.7 = success. KR ≠ KPI.

cards.def: Key Performance Indicators: quantifiable metrics that evaluate progress toward strategic objectives.
cards.ex: "Our top KPIs — revenue per employee, NPS, and time-to-market — are reviewed at every monthly business review."
cards.tip: Leading KPIs (preditivos: ex. pipeline) vs lagging KPIs (históricos: ex. revenue). Dashboard saudável tem ambos.

cards.def: The process of determining required team capacity to meet projected demand within time and budget constraints.
cards.ex: "Capacity planning revealed we were 30% understaffed for the digital transformation workstream in Q3."
cards.tip: Recursos = pessoas, orçamento, equipamentos, tempo. Erros em capacity planning são a causa #1 de missed deadlines.

cards.def: The process of identifying and assigning available assets to maximize the probability of project success.
cards.ex: "Suboptimal resource allocation was the primary driver of the six-month schedule overrun on the ERP."
cards.tip: Linked diretamente a capacity planning. Um dos top PM responsibilities. Includes: leveling e re-allocation.

cards.def: A pre-defined backup strategy activated when a risk materializes, enabling a structured response.
cards.ex: "Our contingency plan for the factory shutdown involved activating a secondary supplier contract within 72 hours."
cards.tip: Contingency = reação ao risco quando ocorre. Mitigation = reduz probabilidade. Dois conceitos distintos no PMBOK.

cards.pt: gráfico de Gantt / cronograma de barras
cards.def: A bar chart illustrating a project schedule with tasks, durations, and dependencies visualized over time.
cards.ex: "The Gantt chart revealed three critical tasks scheduled in parallel with insufficient resources."
cards.tip: Named after Henry Gantt (1910s). MS Project, Smartsheet, Monday usam. Essencial para comunicar cronograma.

cards.def: The evaluation of competing options by weighing costs, benefits, and risks against strategic priorities.
cards.ex: "The trade-off analysis between speed and quality led to a recommendation for a phased launch."
cards.tip: Central em strategic decision-making. McKinsey usa muito: "What are we giving up, and is that acceptable?"

cards.def: The process of ranking competing tasks or goals by value and urgency to direct effort most effectively.
cards.ex: "Without prioritization criteria, the team spread effort across 12 initiatives and completed none satisfactorily."
cards.tip: Frameworks: MoSCoW, Eisenhower Matrix, ICE Score, RICE. Link prioritization to strategic value and feasibility.

cards.def: A distinct, semi-independent area of work within a larger project, managed by a dedicated sub-team.
cards.ex: "The transformation had four workstreams: people, process, technology, and governance — each with a named lead."
cards.tip: Muito comum na McKinsey. Engagements são organizados em workstreams com leads. Sinônimo de "track" ou "pillar".

cards.def: A Scrum ceremony where the team defines the sprint goal and commits to specific backlog items.
cards.ex: "Sprint planning took longer because acceptance criteria were undefined for three high-priority user stories."
cards.tip: Sprint Planning → Execution → Review → Retrospective. Regra: 2h de planning por semana de sprint.

cards.def: The systematic identification and documentation of relationships between project tasks or workstreams.
cards.ex: "Rigorous dependencies mapping prevented three critical path collisions across workstreams."
cards.tip: Network diagram (PERT/CPM) é o resultado. Cross-workstream dependencies são as mais arriscadas em large programs.
